name: Chinese Pepper Steak
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons ginger root, peeled and grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the steak for at least 15 minutes.
2. Add oil to a hot wok.
3. Swirl and stir fry garlic, ginger, and scallions for 30 seconds.
4. Using a slotted spoon, remove half of the steak and stir fry for 3 minutes. Set aside.
5. Repeat with the remaining steak. Stir fry for an additional 3 minutes.
6. Add oil to the wok and stir fry onion and green peppers for 2 minutes.
7. Push the vegetables to the sides of the wok.
8. Pour in the marinade and stir until thickened and bubbly.
9. Return the vegetables, then add the remaining steak.
10. Cook over low heat until thoroughly heated.
